description: An EHS specialist needs to submit the annual Tier II Emergency and Hazardous Chemical Inventory report to state and local agencies.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report of the maximum and average quantities of all hazardous chemicals stored on site over the last year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully queries the inventory system for the required data.

nodes.task_description: Use the inventory data to populate the Tier II reporting form.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly fills out the report with all chemicals exceeding the reporting thresholds.

nodes.task_description: Submit the report through the state's online portal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads and submits the final report.
